response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed-systems fundamentals (low-latency systems at Dunnhumby, real-time infrastructure, TDD culture) and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling at Naver, but falls short on critical CTO requirements: no demonstrated executive leadership or team-scaling track record, zero fintech experience, no production multi-agent AI systems (his MCP work is infrastructure/tooling, not agentic product deployment), and no evidence of operating in regulated or high-stakes financial environments. This is a capable senior IC missing the executive scope, domain depth, and proven multi-agent deployment track record the role demands.
strengths: Strong backend and real-time systems foundation from Dunnhumby (millions of req/s, low-latency async I/O, high-performance databases)
Engineering culture alignment: advocates TDD, trunk-based development, and knowledge-sharing through workshops and talks
Current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at Naver demonstrates emerging fluency in agentic tooling
concerns: No executive or director-level leadership experience—resume shows senior IC and staff roles only; CTO role requires P&L ownership and board communication
Zero fintech or regulated-industry experience; no evidence of credit systems, payment flows, compliance frameworks, or financial operational risk management
Production multi-agent AI gap: current MCP work is developer tooling and code generation, not deployment of stateful, coordinated agents in production systems

key_factors.factor: Missing executive leadership and team scaling track record
No fintech domain knowledge or regulated-environment experience
Strong backend and real-time systems expertise
